reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio bien y la cafetería también. El personal muy amable.PERO EL ESTACIONAMIENTO PARA SOCIOS MUY MAL. Supuestamente es gratis para socios domiciliados a más de 100 kilómetros, como es mi caso. No sólo me lo cobraron, sino que ni siquiera me dieron ticket. Pésimo.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station was good, and the café was too. The staff was very friendly. BUT THE MEMBER PARKING WAS TERRIBLE. It's supposedly free for members who live more than 100 kilometers away, as is my case. Not only did they charge me, but they didn't even give me a ticket. Awful.

reviewReply.comment: Buenas tardes Enrique, vamos a comunicarnos telefónicamente para brindarle una solución. gracias.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4LTRIYW9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Vas a encontrar todos los servicios en esta estación, si SOS turista es una gol de chilena de media cancha.....
Inflamado de neumatico gratis....
Un shop muy completo.
Lavadero premium.
Esos son los puntos a favor contra son los baños en hora pico de la mañana
De toda en gente en situación de calle
DUCHANDOSE EN LOS LAVATORIOS!!!!
AFEITANDOSE
Y DURMIENDO EN LOS HABITACULOS.

(Translated by Google)
You'll find all the services at this station; if you're a tourist, it's a steal! Free tire inflation. A very complete shop. Premium car wash. These are the pros; the downsides are the bathrooms during the morning rush hour. And all sorts of homeless people... SHOWERING IN THE SINKS!!! SHAVING
AND SLEEPING IN THE STORAGE ROOMS.

reviews.comment:
Fuimos a comer algo con mi pareja después de un evento, el chico que nos atendió muy amable y la comida esta bien para pasar el hambre y es barato.

(Translated by Google)
My partner and I went to eat something after an event. The guy who served us was very friendly, the food was good enough to stave off hunger, and it was cheap.
